steps.title: Use linear form
steps.content:
A linear function can be written as
$$f(x)=mx+b$$
where $m$ is the slope and $b$ is the vertical intercept.

steps.title: Substitute the graph facts
steps.content: The slope is $42$, so $m=42$. The graph passes through $(0,0)$, so $b=0$. $$f(x)=42x+0$$ $$f(x)=42x$$ The answer is D.
